arts.ttl: Player will ask to leave Brighton in January – Wants to remain in the Premier League
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Julio Enciso will ask to leave the club in January and go to another Premier League team. That’s according to journalist Christian Martin, with the information from him relayed by La Nacion. The newspaper explains that Martin was recently on Versus radio where he was discussing Enciso’s immediate future. He’s The post Player will ask to leave Brighton in January – Wants to remain in the Premier League appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Evan Ferguson to Leicester verdict delivered - January transfer, Eduoard decision, loan dilemma - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Leicester, who appointed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager to replace Steve Cooper last month, could do with an injection of quality in attack in January and they are chasing a permanent deal for Brighton's out-of-favour striker Ferguson, according to The Sun. City think that the 20-year-old would be ideal for their side as they battle to stay in the top flight. If City are going to sign a new striker, it has to be somebody with something different to offer and Ferguson certainly ticks that box.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Brighton & Hove Albion injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Leicester boss Ruud van Nistelrooy wants to 'bring in Man United starlet on loan in the January transfer window'
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy enjoyed a winning start as Leicester manager as he guided the Foxes to a 3-1 win at home to West Ham.

arts.ttl: ‘We spoke about that…’: van Nistelrooy shares Leicester transfer plan for January
arts.sum: Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has confirmed that he will have funds to strengthen the squad during the January transfer window. When asked if funds will be made available in January, he said to Leicester Mercury: “Yes”. The development will come as a major boost for the club and it will certainly excite the […] The post ‘We spoke about that…’: van Nistelrooy shares Leicester transfer plan for January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy confirms Leicester City January transfer window boost
arts.sum: There is money for Ruud van Nistelrooy to spend this January should the Leicester City manager’s squad assessment show new recruits are necessary. First, he needs to assess his squad over the next month to determine if and what City might need to do in January.

arts.ttl: Pundits divided as Ruud van Nistelrooy looks to repeat Leicester City magic against Brighton
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy looked like he had the magic touch after guiding Leicester City to victory against West Ham just three days after watching his new team blitzed by Brentford. Harry Redknapp: “I was as shocked as anyone about Ruud van Nistelrooy managing Leicester, and the shock factor went into overdrive when Jamie Vardy pounced after 98 seconds and got that goal against West Ham. Ruud may say he’s not a romantic manager and is purely a results man, but even he would have noticed the romance there.

arts.ttl: Winks, Buonanotte, El Khannouss - Leicester injury update for Brighton clash
arts.sum: Asked if there were any new injuries in his ranks, van Nistelrooy said at his press conference on Friday afternoon: “The squad from Tuesday was available today to train. Van Nistelrooy will have to make at least one change to his 11 on Sunday afternoon though.

arts.ttl: 'The pace he has...': Van Nistelrooy really impressed by Leicester ace who could make first Prem start vs Brighton
arts.sum: He was very impressive vs West Ham...

arts.ttl: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler says 'the result will come' before Leicester Premier League clash
arts.sum: The Seagulls head coach commented on the importance of Sunday’s game before his side travel away to Leicester.
